2605.18621.title: CrossView Suite: Harnessing Cross-view Spatial Intelligence of MLLMs with Dataset, Model and Benchmark
2605.18621.paper_summary: Spatial intelligence requires multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to move beyond single-view perception and reason consistently about objects, visibility, geometry, and interactions across multiple viewpoints. However, progress in cross-view reasoning remains limited by three major gaps: the scarcity of large-scale well-annotated training data, the lack of comprehensive benchmarks for systematic evaluation, and the absence of explicit alignment mechanisms that establish object-level consistency across views. To address these gaps, we thoroughly develop CrossView Suite across three coordinated components: CrossViewSet, CrossViewBench, and CrossViewer. Firstly, we introduce a multi-agent data engine to meticulously curate a large-scale, high-quality cross-view instruction dataset, termed CrossViewSet, covering 17 fine-grained task types with 1.6M samples. Second, we meticulously create a scene-disjoint CrossViewBench to comprehensively assess the cross-view spatial understanding capability of an MLLM, evaluating it across various aspects. Finally, we propose CrossViewer, a progressive three-stage framework for cross-view spatial reasoning in MLLMs, following a Perception -> Alignment -> Reasoning paradigm. Our method equips an adaptive spatial region tokenizer to capture fine-grained object representations, and then aligns the multi-view objects explicitly, and thus fuses aligned features for boosting the cross-view inference capacity for MLLMs. Extensive experiments and analyses show that large-scale training data, systematic evaluation, and explicit cross-view alignment are all critical for advancing MLLMs from single-view perception toward real-world spatial intelligence. The project page is available at https://github.com/Thinkirin/Crossview-Suite.
2605.18621.paper_summary_zh: 空間智能需要多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）超越單一視角感知，並在多個視點之間對物體、可見性、幾何形狀和互動進行一致的推理。<lb/>然而，跨視角推理的進展受到三個主要差距的限制：缺乏大規模良好標註的訓練數據、缺乏系統評估的全面基準，以及缺乏明確的對齊機制來建立視角間的物體級一致性。<lb/>為了解決這些差距，我們在三個協調組件中徹底開發了CrossView Suite：CrossViewSet、CrossViewBench和CrossViewer。<lb/>首先，我們引入了一個多代理數據引擎，以細緻地策劃一個大規模、高質量的跨視角指令數據集，稱為CrossViewSet，涵蓋17種細粒度任務類型，共有1.6M樣本。<lb/>其次，我們精心創建了一個場景不重疊的CrossViewBench，以全面評估MLLM的跨視角空間理解能力，並從各個方面進行評估。<lb/>最後，我們提出了CrossViewer，一個針對MLLM的跨視角空間推理的漸進式三階段框架，遵循感知 -> 對齊 -> 推理的範式。<lb/>我們的方法配備了一個自適應空間區域標記器，以捕捉細粒度的物體表示，然後明確地對齊多視角物體，從而融合對齊的特徵，以提升MLLM的跨視角推理能力。<lb/>廣泛的實驗和分析表明，大規模訓練數據、系統評估和明確的跨視角對齊對於推進MLLM從單一視角感知到現實世界的空間智能都是至關重要的。<lb/>項目頁面可在 https://github.com/Thinkirin/Crossview-Suite 獲得。
2605.18621.author: Wei Wang et.al.
2605.18621.authors: Wei Wang, Yuqian Yuan, Tianwei Lin, Wenqiao Zhang, Siliang Tang, Jun Xiao, Yueting Zhuang
